tasks.description: Fix orchestrator queue recovery after task rejection
tasks.context: Orchestrator halts entire queue when any task is rejected. Update backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to mark rejected tasks as 'failed', continue processing remaining queued tasks, emit proper rejection events, and restore queue execution flow after failures.

Multi-concern tasks bypass validation rules. Add strict enforcement in backend/src/utils/task-complexity-validator.ts: reject tasks with multiple file patterns, enforce single-responsibility principle, validate agent scope boundaries, require explicit file paths from tree.

tasks.description: Add pre-execution validation gate in orchestrator
tasks.context: Tasks reach execution without complexity checks. Insert validation gate in backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts before task execution: call task-complexity-validator, auto-reject invalid tasks with detailed feedback, log validation failures, prevent multi-file tasks from reaching agents.

tasks.description: Add rejection state persistence and recovery logging
tasks.context: Orchestrator loses rejection context on restart. Update backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to persist rejection reason/timestamp to database, add recovery logging on startup, implement rejection metrics tracking, expose rejection history via status endpoint.

No tests exist for validator enforcement. Create backend/tests/utils/task-complexity-validator.test.ts with cases: single-file pass, multi-file reject, invalid agent scope reject, missing file path reject, boundary condition handling.
